summary: Script is well-written (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, clean error handling, modular functions) but workflow is incomplete. Critical gaps: (1) Workflow references test/bump-version.bats with no file provided; (2) Missing actionlint validation step (explicitly required by task); (3) No mechanism to generate act-result.txt (required artifact); (4) Workflow accepts inputs but no test harness orchestrates multiple test cases through act; (5) No fixture files or test case definitions. Workflow structure is sound but lacks the integration testing infrastructure needed to validate the pipeline per requirements.
